00000006832005196679.title: Scott Essential Recycled Coreless Toilet Paper, 2-ply, White, 1,000 Sheets/Roll, 36 Rolls/Carton (04007)

paragraph: Scott Essential provides reliable balance of efficiency, performance, and value. Scott Coreless High-Capacity Standard Roll Toilet Paper gives your office a reliable washroom experience and allows fewer refills, less waste, and easy maintenance. As a coreless bath tissue with high-capacity features, each roll is nearly 50% longer than our standard roll bath tissue. As an environmentally friendly toilet tissue, it eliminates the cardboard core and paper wrap. This product meets or exceeds EPA guidelines for minimum post-consumer waste content, is ECOLOGO and FSC certified; FSC mix paper supporting responsible forestry. It can be used in most coreless toilet paper commercial dispensers. Scott Coreless High-Capacity Standard Roll Toilet Paper is compatible with the Kimberly-Clark Professional ICON dispensing system with interchangeable faceplate technology.
bullets: 1,000 Sheets/Roll; 36 Rolls of Scott Essential Coreless High-Capacity Standard Roll Toilet Paper/Case; 36,000 Sheets/Case; 2-Ply; White
This 2-Ply Scott Essential coreless toilet paper is efficient with fewer refills, less waste, and easy maintenance
Each bath tissue roll is nearly 50% longer than our standard roll bathroom tissue with 100% core and paper wrap elimination
Compatible with the Kimberly-Clark Professional ICON dispensing system
ECOLOGO and FSC certified; FSC mix paper supporting responsible forestry; Meets or exceeds EPA guidelines for post-consumer waste content

00000006832005144489.title: Scotch-Brite Heavy Duty Dishwand, Green/Yellow (650-4)

paragraph: The dish scrubbing wand also features a built-in scraper to cut through stuck-on food messes. Use these tough heavy duty dishwands for cleaning grease, grime, and dirt on safe-to-use surfaces such as uncoated cookware, oven racks, concrete, and tools. The scrubbing fibers of this dish scrub wand are made from 100% recycled content for a sustainable clean. For an easy refresh, simply put the dishwand in the dishwasher top rack to sanitize and reuse. This cleaning wand will work with all Scotch-Brite Dishwand Refills. Scotch-Brite cleaning supplies give you the power to quickly clean up life’s everyday messes — that’s why we’re America’s #1 selling dishwand brand.
bullets: ONE SCRUBBING DISH WAND: This pack includes one Scotch-Brite Heavy Duty Dishwand
3X SCRUBBING POWER: These heavy duty sponge wands offer 3X scrubbing power* to take on everyday grease, grime, and messes with ease
PERFECT FOR TOUGH JOBS: They’re the perfect sponge wands for cleaning uncoated pots and pans, grates, oven racks, outdoor grills, and more
CONVENIENT DESIGN: The dishwand dispenses dish soap, includes a built-in scraper for stuck-on food, and stands upright for cleaner storage and faster drying
SANITIZE UP TO 20X: Sanitize and clean these dishwands in the dishwasher up to 20X
MADE FROM RECYCLED CONTENT: The scrubbing fibers are made from 100% recycled plastic for a sustainable clean
REFILL & REUSE: Make your dishwand go further by easily replacing the scrubbing head with Scotch-Brite Dishwand Refills
AMERICA’S #1 DISHWAND BRAND: Committed to quality and satisfaction, known for innovation in cleaning tools, and trusted for 65 years** (**2023 IPSOS Brand Health)
headliner: Experience a gratifying clean with the Scotch-Brite Heavy Duty Dishwand. This soap dispensing dishwand provides heavy duty power for tough messes while keeping your hands out of the mess.

00000006832005144489.title: Scotch-Brite Non-Scratch Dishwand Refill, Blue, 2/Pack (483-12)

paragraph: Experience a gratifying clean with Scotch-Brite Non-Scratch Dishwand Refills. This dish wand sponge features a built-in food scraper to cut through stuck-on food messes. Use these dish wand sponge refills on safe-to-use surfaces, such as non-stick cookware, countertops, showers and tubs. Non-stick cookware benefits when using this dishwand refill pad since it will not remove the protective coatings of your pots and pans. Even the messiest of dishes and surfaces will shine like new with a quick and easy scrub from these versatile dishwand non-scratch sponges. The scrubbing fibers are made from 100% recycled content for a sustainable clean. To clean, simply put the dishwand head you are using in the dishwasher top rack to sanitize and reuse it. Please note that some product packaging of the dish wand refill may look different from the images displayed. One package contains two dishwand sponge refills, so you can buy them in bulk and not have to make a trip to the store every time you need to replace your dish wand pad. All Scotch-Brite Dishwands are compatible with these dishwand refills. Stock up your cleaning supplies with Scotch-Brite Non-Scratch Dishwand Refills and see why Scotch-Brite is the beloved cleaning brand for many households. Scotch-Brite gives you the power to clean up life’s everyday messes — in the kitchen and beyond. From everyday jobs to cleaning hacks, you'll see why Scotch-Brite Brand is America’s #1 selling dishwand brand.
bullets: Dishwand Refill
Scrubbing fibers are made from 100% recycled content.
Non-scratch cleaning power for everyday jobs.
Safe on: Non-stick cookware, countertops, showers and tubs and more.
Scraper helps remove stuck-on food.
When it is time to change the head, hold the dishwand with head facing up. Push tab away from handle, slide refill off and push forward to remove. Slide new head onto handle and click into place.
For Advanced Soap Control Dishwands, remove Soap Stopper by pushing up through back of new head to dispense soap through hole. Leave Soap Stopper in place for classic dishwands.
Fill it up with your favorite dish soap and effortlessly wipe away grease and grime.
Top shelf dishwasher safe and reuse.
Scotch-Brite dishwands are long lasting and reusable.

paragraph: Keep your dishes clean and your hands out of the water with the Scotch-Brite Soap Control Non-Scratch Scrub Dots Dishwand, from America's No. 1 selling dishwand brand. This long-lasting dish sponge with soap dispenser handle features 3x the scrubbing power* to take down everyday messes with ease. Offering precise soap control with the push of a button, this dish scrubber dispenses the right amount of dish soap exactly where and when you need it. Say goodbye to soap spills for good thanks to the leak-free guarantee and innovative valve that keeps dish soap from leaking, no matter how you store your scrub sponge wand. The soft-touch surface provides a non-slip grip, and the built-in scraper helps remove stuck-on foods. This non-scratch cleaning sponge is safe to use on dishes, non-stick cookware, countertops, tubs and showers, and more. Plus, it resists odors and rinses clean – even eggs and cheese won’t stick to this easy-to-clean kitchen sponge with handle. Just fill it with your favorite dish soap, and effortlessly wipe away grease and grime. The Scotch-Brite Soap Control Non-Scratch Scrub Dots Dishwand is durable, reusable and top shelf dishwasher safe, with scrubbing fibers made from 75% recycled content.
bullets: ONE SCRUBBING DISH WAND: Includes one Scotch-Brite Odor Resist Non-Scratch Soap Control Dishwand with a scrub sponge designed for gentle yet effective cleaning power
STANDS UPRIGHT: Upgraded base allows dishwand to stand upright for cleaner storage, faster drying, and reduced leaks
RINSES CLEAN & RESISTS ODORS: Resists odor buildup and easily rinses clean between uses
SAFE ON MOST SURFACES: Multipurpose sponge wand for cleaning dishes, non-stick pots and pans, countertops, glassware, tubs, showers, and more; Do not use on stainless steel appliances
LEAK-FREE DESIGN: Push-button dispenses the right amount of dish soap, a leak-free valve keeps soap contained, and a built-in scraper tackles stuck-on messes with ease
SANITIZE UP TO 20X: Sanitize and clean these dishwands on the top rack of the dishwasher up to 20X
PRECISE SOAP CONTROL: Dispenses the right amount of dish soap exactly where and when you need it, offering precise soap control with the push of a button
REFILL & REUSE: Make your dishwand go further by easily replacing the scrubbing head with Scotch-Brite Dishwand Refills
AMERICA’S #1 SPONGE BRAND: Committed to quality and satisfaction, known for innovation in cleaning tools, and trusted for 65 years (2023 IPSOS Brand Health)

*This Scotch-Brite cleaning tool contains an antimicrobial agent in the scrubber pad that protects the product from bacterial odors. Product does not protect users or others from food-borne or disease-causing bacteria. Clean thoroughly after use

expandedDescr: Keep your hands out of the mess with the Scotch-Brite™ Odor Resist Non-Scratch Soap Control Dishwand. This non-scratch cleaning wand delivers gentle, effective cleaning on everyday messes and is safe for non-stick cookware and other household surfaces. The built-in scraper removes stuck-on food, while the push-button dispenses the right amount of dish soap every time. On the non-slip grip handle, a leak-free valve keeps soap contained, while the upgraded base allows the standing dish wand to remain upright between uses for a cleaner sink area and faster drying. When it’s time to change the scrubbing head, simply push the tab to release, slide off the refill, and click on a new one. Scotch-Brite™ cleaning supplies give you the power to quickly clean up life’s everyday messes — that’s why we’re America’s #1 selling dishwand brand. *This Scotch-Brite® cleaning tool contains an antimicrobial agent in the scrubber pad that protects the product from bacterial odors. Product does not protect users or others from food-borne or disease-causing bacteria. Clean thoroughly after each use.

paragraph: Scott Essential provides reliable balance of efficiency, performance, and value. Scott Coreless High-Capacity Standard Roll Toilet Paper gives your office a reliable washroom experience and allows fewer refills, less waste, and easy maintenance. As a coreless bath tissue with high-capacity features, each roll is nearly 50% longer than our standard roll bath tissue. As an environmentally friendly toilet tissue, it eliminates the cardboard core and paper wrap. This product meets or exceeds EPA guidelines for minimum post-consumer waste content, is ECOLOGO and FSC certified; FSC mix paper supporting responsible forestry. It can be used in most coreless toilet paper commercial dispensers. Scott Coreless High-Capacity Standard Roll Toilet Paper is compatible with the Kimberly-Clark Professional ICON dispensing system with interchangeable faceplate technology.

paragraph: Experience a gratifying clean with Scotch-Brite Non-Scratch Dishwand Refills. This dish wand sponge features a built-in food scraper to cut through stuck-on food messes. Use these dish wand sponge refills on safe-to-use surfaces, such as non-stick cookware, countertops, showers and tubs. Non-stick cookware benefits when using this dishwand refill pad since it will not remove the protective coatings of your pots and pans. Even the messiest of dishes and surfaces will shine like new with a quick and easy scrub from these versatile dishwand non-scratch sponges. The scrubbing fibers are made from 100% recycled content for a sustainable clean. To clean, simply put the dishwand head you are using in the dishwasher top rack to sanitize and reuse it. Please note that some product packaging of the dish wand refill may look different from the images displayed. One package contains two dishwand sponge refills, so you can buy them in bulk and not have to make a trip to the store every time you need to replace your dish wand pad. All Scotch-Brite Dishwands are compatible with these dishwand refills. Stock up your cleaning supplies with Scotch-Brite Non-Scratch Dishwand Refills and see why Scotch-Brite is the beloved cleaning brand for many households. Scotch-Brite gives you the power to clean up life’s everyday messes — in the kitchen and beyond. From everyday jobs to cleaning hacks, you'll see why Scotch-Brite Brand is America’s #1 selling dishwand brand.
bullets: Dishwand Refill
Scrubbing fibers are made from 100% recycled content.
Non-scratch cleaning power for everyday jobs.

When it is time to change the head, hold the dishwand with head facing up. Push tab away from handle, slide refill off and push forward to remove. Slide new head onto handle and click into place.
For Advanced Soap Control Dishwands, remove Soap Stopper by pushing up through back of new head to dispense soap through hole. Leave Soap Stopper in place for classic dishwands.
Fill it up with your favorite dish soap and effortlessly wipe away grease and grime.
Top shelf dishwasher safe and reuse.
Scotch-Brite dishwands are long lasting and reusable.
